adjudicator: Codex visual inspection using rendered PNG previews and machine gate evidence
summary: Visual review of rendered pages shows no blocking layout loss after constrained slot repair. Tables, side navigation, footnotes, and body flow are usable. Warnings remain for compressed chart/table labels and some translation wording, but no blocking visual defect was observed in inspected pages.

dimensions.evidence: candidate previews page 02 and page 04 inspected against source-relative annual report layout
body/table/note hierarchy remains readable; no fallback text remains
side navigation labels render as rotated label units, not stacked fallback text
rotated labels are visually readable after repair
grid and values preserved; some constrained labels are horizontally compressed
some wording is less polished than official copy, but semantic translation is present

known_warnings.evidence: grid and values preserved; some constrained labels are horizontally compressed
some wording is less polished than official copy, but semantic translation is present
